name: HML_chrIII_silent
description: HML (Hidden Mating-type Left) silent cassette near the left telomere of chr III. ~3.4 kb storage cassette carrying alpha info in most lab strains, Sir-silenced (H4K16-deacetylated, Sir2/3/4-bound chromatin). Sequence is near-identical to MATalpha and serves as donor for switching.
expected_copy_count: 1 active MAT + 2 silent (HML, HMR) cassettes, all on chr III
